command: bun run docs:validate && bun run --filter=docs test:browser
oracle: The browser harness observes local render, navigation, server-function, recoverable-error, and console states.
summary: Docs validation reported zero issues and the local browser suite passed seven runtime, rendering, navigation, recoverable-error, and console checks.
omittedDetail: Browser-local artifacts and raw output are not retained in the default route.
nonClaim: Local docs-runtime proof establishes no public-site, deployed SSR, hydration, or availability state.
